data.name: Romancing The Kingdom
data.detailed_description:
This fantasy visual novel starts in the kingdom of Tropia, introducing the heiress to the throne and her companion who are heading towards the annual Spring Celebration. Court intrigue and the politics of succession weigh heavily on Princess Polly, but she meets makes a new male friend while away from the castle. Captain Jack is quite the scandalous man, but he might not be the match for Polly, it's all up to you whether to pursue a relationship with him.

Choose dozens of paths as you follow not just Polly, but a whole cast of characters. Unlock 36 animated erotic scenes you can return to from the replay feature. Go at your own pace and choose which parts the fantasy to experience. Your choices will effect the outcome as the game features multiple endings.

Features:
- Over 2,600 renders
- Thousands of lines of dialogue
- Multiple story paths
- Explicit animated sex scenes (NSFW)
- Many hours of playtime
- Dozens of characters and relationship outcomes
- Mouse or keyboard control

data.short_description: Take the role of Princess Polly, heir to the throne, in this fantasy visual novel. Romance Jack or choose to ignore him and take focus on the ladies instead. Romancing the Kingdom is an adult game with explicit sexual content.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 1.5 GHZ or higher Pentium 4 CPU or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 128mb DirectX 9.0 compatible video card
  • 儲存空間: 17 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: 16 bit DirectX compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10+
  • 處理器: 1.5 GHZ or higher Pentium 4 CPU or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 128mb DirectX 9.0 compatible video card
  • 儲存空間: 17 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04 of Kernel 3.x+
  • 處理器: 1.5 GHZ or higher Pentium 4 CPU or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 128mb DirectX 9.0 compatible video card
  • 儲存空間: 17 GB 可用空間
